T0161.title: Mutual Guarantee Escrow
T0161.definition: In underground data trading, a mutual guarantee mechanism where both parties vouch for the authenticity of a transaction to continue accessing high-value data or premium services. It represents a variant of interest-protection schemes between upstream and downstream actors in the illicit ecosystem.
T0161.description: In underground data trading, a mutual guarantee mechanism where both parties vouch for the authenticity of a transaction to continue accessing high-value data or premium services. It represents a variant of interest-protection schemes between upstream and downstream actors in the illicit ecosystem.
T0161.usageExample: "Come to me for data fills, guaranteed double-lock through the butcher." — Used in illicit data trading scenarios involving underground data acquisition channels and techniques.
